subcodes.first_line: Though, in the words of a speaker from former times, the letters this servant hath sent to thee are ostensibly questions that need no answer
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگرچه به قول قائل قبل رسائل این عبد در آن حضرت مسائل بیجواب و کلمات ناصواب بوده
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
